user.title: Configure NOTAM Integration
user.description: Monitor NOTAMs by aerodrome codes and/or geographic coordinates.

data.aerodromes: ICAO Aerodrome Codes (comma-separated, e.g., EGLL, EGKK, EGSS)

coordinates.title: Add Coordinate Area
coordinates.description: Add geographic areas to monitor NOTAMs by location.

error.no_filters: Must provide either aerodromes or coordinates
error.invalid_icao: Invalid ICAO code format (must be 4 letters)
error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to NATS feed

init.title: NOTAM Options
init.description: Update NOTAM monitoring configuration. Enable 'Modify coordinates' to change geographic areas.

coordinates.title: Add Coordinate Area
coordinates.description: Add geographic areas to monitor NOTAMs by location.

error.no_filters: Must provide either aerodromes or coordinates
error.invalid_icao: Invalid ICAO code format (must be 4 letters)

refresh.name: Refresh NOTAM data
refresh.description: Force an immediate refresh of NOTAM data from the NATS PIB feed, bypassing the normal refresh interval.
